scripts.lint: html-validate --config dev_config/.htmlvalidate.json web/html/*; stylelint --config dev_config/.stylelintrc.json --formatter verbose --fix web/css/*.css; DEBUG=eslint:cli-engine eslint --config dev_config/eslint.config.mjs --fix web/scripts/
scripts.update-modules: rm -rf web/modules/wfa.js web/modules/wfa.wasm; curl https://git.tronnet.net/alu/WFA-JS/releases/download/latest/wfa.js -o web/modules/wfa.js; curl https://git.tronnet.net/alu/WFA-JS/releases/download/latest/wfa.wasm -o web/modules/wfa.wasm
